{{Infobox character
| name = Rhalia
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = Incarnation, Traveler, ghost
| abilities = levitate, separate a person's mind from their body
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

''See also: [[Rhalia Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Rhalia is a guide to the [[City of Light]] who serves as a mentor and evaluator for [[Alin]]. She possesses the ability to fly or hover, often sitting cross-legged in midair or performing acrobatic movements like backflips and pirouettes. Characterized by her golden eyes, blonde hair, and white dresses that flutter in nonexistent breezes, she is typically a cheerful and bright presence, though she can appear calculating, cold, or deeply sorrowful. Her role involves testing travelers to see if they possess the necessary virtues, such as patience or temperance, to prove their worth within a [[Territory]]. While she claims she cannot fight and has limited power in the outside world, she can perform various magical tricks within her own domain, such as manifesting golden orbs and orange lights to lift others. Formerly an [[Incarnation]], Rhalia's status changed after she bound herself within [[Elysia]] by opening a Gate to avoid the living death of the [[Trees]], leaving her as something more limited than she once was.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Rhalia is a woman characterized by her bright yellow hair and metallic gold eyes. Tasked with guiding [[Alin]], she serves to test whether he is truly ready for his journey. Although she lacks the ability to fight, she possesses the power of levitation and can separate a person's mind from their physical body.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Rhalia]] is a woman with bright yellow hair and metallic gold eyes.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8">''House of Blades'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Rhalia]] has the ability to levitate.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Rhalia]]'s role is to guide [[Alin]] and test him to see if he is ready.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Rhalia]] cannot fight.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Rhalia]] has golden eyes and hair.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c20">''House of Blades'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Rhalia]] can separate a person's mind from their body.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c20" />}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Rhalia serves as [[Alin]]'s guide through the [[City of Light]], leading him specifically through the area known as [[Elysia]]. During their journey, she explains that handling certain powers necessitates the possession of specific virtues. She also provides [[Alin]] with descriptions of silver light and offers a warning that attempting to control power will ultimately result in the power controlling him.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Rhalia]] is [[Alin]]'s guide to the [[City of Light]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c11">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Rhalia]] is guiding [[Alin]] through [[Elysia]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Rhalia]] explains that certain powers require specific virtues to handle.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Rhalia]] warned that controlling power leads to the power controlling you.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Rhalia]] previously described silver light to [[Alin]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A former [[Incarnation]] and [[Traveler]], Rhalia exists now as a ghost. While remaining silent at certain points, she advised [[Alin]] to utilize the [[Silver Light]] and later whispered guidance to him from within a Gate. During these moments, she appeared with golden hair and noted that five [[Incarnations]] possessed the power to bring down the walls of [[Elysia]]. Appearing in a white-robed form alongside a red-clad sister, she eventually drifted next to [[Alin]].}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rhalia]] is a character who advises [[Alin]] to use the [[Silver Light]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7">''City of Light'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rhalia]] said nothing.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rhalia]] was formerly an [[Incarnation]] and a [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rhalia]] is a [[Traveler]] and a ghost.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rhalia]] is in a Gate next to [[Alin]] and has golden hair.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rhalia]] was whispering advice to [[Alin]] from his Gate.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rhalia]] noted that five [[Incarnations]] could bring down the walls of [[Elysia]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rhalia]] has a white-robed form and a red-clad sister.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rhalia]] drifts next to [[Alin]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“You have to use the Silver Light, Alin! Call the Silver!”<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|"Now I am no longer Incarnation nor Traveler, but something…more limited."<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
